rule_metadata.author: Sean Metcalf (source), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: PowerShell Called from an Executable Version Mismatch

rules.rule_text:
title: PowerShell Called from an Executable Version Mismatch
id: c70e019b-1479-4b65-b0cc-cd0c6093a599
status: test
description: Detects PowerShell called from an executable by the version mismatch
  method
references:
- https://adsecurity.org/?p=2921
author: Sean Metcalf (source), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2017-03-05
modified: 2023-10-27
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: ps_classic_start
detection:
  selection_engine:
    Data|contains:
    - EngineVersion=2.
    - EngineVersion=4.
    - EngineVersion=5.
  selection_host:
    Data|contains: HostVersion=3.
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
